docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-26-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-08-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVES, INCLUDING THE DAUGHTER WILL GO TO DEFENDANT'S HOUSE ON DECEMBER 08, 2013 AT 9:00 AM TO RETRIEVE PLAINTIFF'S PERSONAL PROPERTY." PER JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER-ENRIQUE MEDINA. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION - SENT TO PLAINTIFF
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF FILED BY FRIAS, SARAI FRIAS, PEDRO
NO APPEARANCES; CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK S. VAN TREE & M. MANZELLA (DEPT. 506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY FRIAS, SARAI AS TO DEFENDANT FRIAS, PEDRO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-26-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED OCT-08-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FRIAS, PEDRO
